bugs.title: First message in planning session not persisted to chat history
bugs.description: When sending the first message to a new planning session (no session_id provided, server creates session), the user message and full assistant response are not persisted in GetChatHistory. The session was created (sessionCreated event received, session_id f0a29f57-8e7d-4a03-8f70-893506374f50), but GetChatHistory for that session only returns 2 messages (the second user message and its response). The first message that triggered session creation, along with the AI's substantial response including create_itinerary_items tool calls, is completely missing from the history.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Send message A to CHAT_MODE_PLANNING with trip_id but NO session_id. Server returns sessionCreated with new session_id. 2. Send message B to same session with the session_id from step 1. 3. Call GetChatHistory for that session. Only message B and its response appear. Message A and its response are missing.
bugs.expected: GetChatHistory should return 4 messages: message A (user), message A response (assistant), message B (user), message B response (assistant).
bugs.actual: GetChatHistory returns only 2 messages: message B (user) and message B response (assistant). Message A and its full assistant response (including tool calls that created 21 itinerary items) are lost.

bugs.title: ListChatSessions lastMessageAt not updated after subsequent messages
bugs.description: The planning session's lastMessageAt timestamp equals its createdAt timestamp (2026-04-10T14:16:13.722219Z), despite a second message being sent to the session after creation. The lastMessageAt field should reflect the time of the most recent message, not just the session creation time.
bugs.expected: lastMessageAt should be updated to reflect the timestamp of the last message sent in the session.
bugs.actual: lastMessageAt equals createdAt for the planning session even though message B was sent later.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: This was a structural data integrity test. Trip creation and itinerary generation worked well. The critical finding is that the first message in a newly-created planning session is not persisted to chat history, which is a significant data loss bug. Session listing and cross-session isolation both work correctly. All messages that were persisted had non-empty content and correct role alternation. Companion mode responses were relevant and concise.
